user_query: My laptop is not connecting to WiFi

retrieval_result.title: WiFi connection issue
retrieval_result.solution: Restart your router, reconnect to WiFi, forget and re-add the network, and check if airplane mode is turned off.

final_response: Your issue has been classified as Network. Suggested solution: Restart your router, reconnect to WiFi, forget and re-add the network, and check if airplane mode is turned off.
